title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS libraries to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and 40+ other GGUF models locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows with GPU acceleration.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API; install via npm install ollama.

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama API; install via pip install ollama.

title: jmorganca/ollama
summary: PyPI landing page for the official ollama Python package; 100k+ monthly downloads.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama models; supports multi-model chats, file uploads, RAG, and user management.

title: ollama-webui on npm
summary: Community-published npm wrapper for the Ollama WebUI frontend components.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama LLM and embeddings wrappers; pip install langchain-ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes, AWS Lambda, Fly.io, and using it with LangChain, LlamaIndex, etc.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose files for running Ollama server and webui containers.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama; available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama API; crates.io/ollama-rs.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community-maintained Go client for Ollama; go get github.com/ollama/ollama-go.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with Ollama; gem install ollama.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat wrapper written in Node.js; npm install -g ollama-cli-chat.

title: ollama-telegram-bot
summary: Telegram bot that forwards messages to a local Ollama instance; Docker ready.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that uses Ollama for slash-command chat and image-captioning.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Official registry of 40+ GGUF models (Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.) with pull commands.

title: ollama-helm-chart
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-github-action
summary: GitHub Action to install and start Ollama in CI pipelines; useful for testing LLM integrations.
